rules.text: Search for Horizon Europe EU Mission on Climate Adaptation and Disaster Risk Management calls similar to HORIZON-MISS-2026-01-CLIMA-04, but with deadlines after September 2026. Include related programmes such as LIFE, Interreg, or other EU funding instruments covering climate adaptation and disaster risk reduction with later submission windows.

Search for integrated flood resilience, climate adaptation, and disaster risk reduction funding opportunities specifically in South-East Asia and the Pacific region. Include opportunities from the Asian Development Bank (ADB), Green Climate Fund (GCF), and World Bank. Focus on infrastructure, community resilience, and nature-based solutions for flood management.

Find more deep tech climate adaptation funding opportunities similar to EIC Accelerator Deep Tech for Climate Adaptation Challenge 2026 (EU-level innovation grants for SMEs and startups). Also search for NWO (Dutch Research Council) grants relevant to climate adaptation and deep tech innovation.
